def positive_celery_or_rq_task_imports_web_framework_app():
    rule_id = "celery_or_rq_task_imports_web_framework_app"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Celery or RQ task module imports the Flask app object or FastAPI application at the top level."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
